extension.description: Unified plugin: Skin Installer, Skin Switcher, Userdata Backup & Restore, OpenWizard, and ABUKARIM Wizard.
extension.news: v1.8.9.1 - Patcher: TinyPPI _ALLOW_NON_COREELEC entry now targets resources/lib/ui/overlay.py (the 1.9.7+ package layout) with resources/lib/overlay.py kept as a fallback for TinyPPI <= 1.8.6. Adds general rel_path_alternates support to any patch entry (first existing candidate wins). v1.8.5[CR]- New tool: Fix Add-on Update Origins - links zip/portal-installed add-ons back to their repository in the Addons DB so they show as installed and auto-update again[CR]- Skin Installer now sets the repository origin automatically after every skin/companion install[CR][CR]v1.7.4.0[CR]- New tool: AM6B CoreELEC Fix - applies/reverts the AF3 GBM poster flicker workaround (bordersize inset on Layout_Poster, same as Aeon Nox Silvo)[CR][CR]v1.7.3.8 - Added TinyPPI patch: set _ALLOW_NON_COREELEC = True in resources/lib/overlay.py so the overlay can launch on non-CoreELEC platforms (macOS dev/testing). v1.7.3.7 - BINGIE REMOVAL: removed everything pertaining to the Bingie TMDbHelper fork (plugin.video.tmdb.bingie.helper / skin.bingie). Patcher: dropped the 3 Bingie Trakt QR patch entries and both Bingie blobs. Skin Switcher + Skin Installer: removed the stock/Bingie fork toggle (_apply_helper_for_skin) and its enable/disable helpers; skin.bingie companion mapping removed. service.py: removed the boot-time _reconcile_helper_forks() one-fork rule (moot with a single helper). Backup Manager: bingie helper removed from OpenWizard EXCLUDES. v1.7.3.3 - FIRST-RUN "sometimes does not auto start" FIX (3 root causes): 1) Crash-resilient trigger: the self-trigger now keys off first_run.done (written only on COMPLETION, storing the build id) instead of last_build.id (written at ARM time). Previously a kernel panic / power-cycle mid-sequence (flag already consumed, done never written) left the trigger permanently satisfied and first-run silently never ran again. An interrupted run now simply re-arms on the next boot. Legacy 'done' markers are migrated in place, so devices that already completed first-run do NOT re-run it. 2) Service-killing UnicodeDecodeError: _cleanup_stale_autostart read autostart.sh as strict UTF-8 catching only OSError; corrupted bytes (a possible leftover of the pre-1.7.3 sed self-edit bug) raised UnicodeDecodeError, killed service.py before the first-run trigger was ever evaluated. Now reads with errors='replace', and the boot chores are individually fenced so nothing can block the trigger. 3) Reboot race: the CoreELEC reboot prompt moved out of _run_steps to AFTER the done marker is written — a user-approved Reboot could previously race the finally block and (with the new done-keyed trigger) would have re-run the whole sequence next boot. v1.7.3.1 - Removed all script.tinyppi patch entries: the AF3 font remap (TinyPPI 1.6.1.1 now manages its own Noto fonts via tools.tinyppi) and the set_ui_position crash fixes + CpuTopUsageVar paren fix (both fixed upstream in 1.6.1; old code paths no longer exist). v1.7.3 - AUTOSTART SELF-EDIT FIX: autostart.sh's guisettings-restore block no longer removes itself via sed -i on its own file — rewriting a running shell script's own file mid-read is unsafe on BusyBox ash and could corrupt/delete autostart.sh outright. Cleanup now happens from service.py on the next Kodi start instead (a separate, already-exited process by that point, so it's safe). - OE_SETTINGS.XML RESTORE: the autostart restore now also stages and restores /storage/.kodi/userdata/addon_data/service.coreelec.settings/oe_settings.xml, not just guisettings.xml. CoreELEC's own settings service re-syncs its remembered audiooutput.audiodevice etc. from oe_settings.xml back over guisettings.xml during the session, so restoring guisettings.xml alone didn't stick — a stale device value in oe_settings.xml (e.g. a dev-machine placeholder) kept reappearing every boot regardless. v1.6.9.10 - TMDbHelper Trakt QR ROOT-CAUSE FIX: QR window injected to resources/skins/Default (capital D) and dialog now loads from 'Default' — was lowercase 'default', which works on macOS but NOT on case-sensitive CoreELEC, so the device silently fell back to the stock code+URL dialog (no QR). v1.6.9.9 - TMDbHelper Trakt QR: poller patch now has a version-resilient regex fallback (re-applies after TMDbHelper updates / reinstalls; was silently reverting to the stock code+URL dialog). v1.6.9.7 - Backup Manager: exclude script.autoruns from backups (added to OpenWizard EXCLUDES). v1.6.9.5 - Removed Umbrella player deploy entry from patcher. v1.6.9.4 - TMDbHelper: patch pins max_threads=3 in addon_data settings.xml (caps CPythonInvoker storm causing UI freeze on AM6B; survives restore). v1.6.9.3 - RedLight: patch kills volume_checker (was forcing SetVolume() and dropping playback volume ~30%). v1.6.9.0 - First-run: CoreELEC reboot prompt 10s after skin loads (YES reboots so autostart.sh runs). v1.6.8.9 - Auto-run first-run on new build apply via shipped resources/build.id (wipe-proof self-trigger). - Re-enabled xbmc.service so first-run triggers automatically on boot. v1.6.8.8 - Skin installer (first-run + manual): auto-confirm YES on the final "Keep this skin?" dialog. v1.6.8.7 - Removed AF3 ColorHighlight patch entry. v1.6.8.6 - POV/Umbrella players switched to RunPlugin (search-mode caused GetDirectory loop). All 4 players now consistent. v1.6.8.5 - Patcher: addon_data target support. Deploy 4 TMDbHelper player JSONs (POV/Umbrella search-mode) post-restore. v1.6.8.4 - TMDbHelper: suppress "not playable" popup for source-select players (dummy strm-gate fix). v1.6.8.3 - RedLight sources_results: dark unfocused card (FF1F2020) - fixes white rows in TIDB results window. v1.6.8.2 - AF3: dark focus highlight (ff202020) fixes white select-dialog rows (TIDB/Seren etc). v1.6.6 - Removed all RedLight patch entries and theme-reset logic.
